subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Marquardt in Stuttgart, 1913-04-26
subcodes.first_line: Speak of our own war, wherein the hosts of aid and confirmation fight against the legions of the darkness of the world of nature
subcodes.first_line_orig: از حرب خودمان بگوئید که با جنود تأیید و نصرت در مقابل لشکر ظلمات عالم طبیعت
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual transformation, @high station of learning
